nasb.text: Absalom said to Hushai, “Is this your loyalty to your friend? Why did you not go with your friend?”

esv.text: And Absalom said to Hushai, “Is this your loyalty to your friend? Why did you not go with your friend?”

cnv.text: 押沙龍問戶篩：“你就以這樣的‘慈愛’待你的朋友嗎？你為甚麼沒有與你的朋友一同走呢？”

ccb.text: 押沙龙问户筛说：“这就是你对朋友的忠诚吗？你为什么不跟你的朋友去呢？”
